title: Dappled Forest Drop 26.3
description: The mod will add the Dappled Forest biome shown on Minecraft Live.
body:
It's a mod that adds a new biome, The Dappled Forest From Drop 26.3, which was showcased on Minecraft Live.

![Mine Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc6b0ea5d1fcf364068704ca53581435b1ee5aca_0.webp)

Currently, the mod includes: a new biome, wood from a new tree, wool stairs and slabs, a new shell mushroom, and an abandoned camp structure.

This mod is designed to immediately test how the new drop will feel in the game and how it can be used.

The mod already has localizations for:

- English
- Russian
- Ukrainian
- Japaneseютю
- Pre-reform Russian
- LoLCat - language

  
P.s.:The mod will be updated in the near future to add all the content that we know about this drop.
But don't judge me too harshly because I'm just a beginner Mod-Maker.
